description: Canonical index for this Storybook pattern. Use Docs.mdx for copy-paste imports and vendor checklist; MinimalTwoPane is the shortest Canvas template (two panes, code rail + block in primary pane).

styles.note: Single file with /* @split-view-section: … */ markers; Storybook Vite plugin compiles each chunk (compiled ?inline CSS drops comments in prod).

integrationOrder: Import and call registerSplitViewPattern / registerSplitViewCodeRail with CSS strings from virtual:split-view-css (see splitView.stories.js).
Import design-system components used by the story.

Use <split-view-pattern> with named slots pane-1, pane-2, and optionally pane-3; optional default-start-pane-width / default-end-pane-width (px) for initial pane-1 / pane-3 widths; set invert-start-divider-grip when pane-2 is dark on a light start pane (two-pane code); set invert-end-divider-grip when pane-3 is dark (three-pane code rail).
Optional end-pane code: wrap kyn-block-code-view in split-view-code-rail for flush rail behavior.
